'''Chad''' was the primary blue-white [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Chad system/Legends|Chad system]] located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. This star was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by at least four [[Planet/Legends|planets]], including [[Chad/Legends|Chadra]].

{{Star-stub}}
